entry.value:
{"diagramDefinition":"classDiagram
 class MenuItem {
 -String englishName
 -String mandarinName
 -double price
 -String category
 -int prepTimeMinutes
 +getters/setters
 +compareTo()
 }
 
 class BSTNode {
 -MenuItem item
 -BSTNode left
 -BSTNode right
 }
 
 class MenuCategoryBST {
 -BSTNode root
 -String category
 +insert(MenuItem)
 +search(String)
 +inOrderTraversal()
 }
 
 class Menu {
 -ArrayList~MenuItem~ allItems
 -HashMap~String,MenuItem~ englishLookup
 -HashMap~String,MenuItem~ mandarinLookup
 -HashMap~String,MenuCategoryBST~ categoryTrees
 +addItem(MenuItem)
 +findByEnglish(String)
 +findByMandarin(String)
 +getCategory(String)
 }
 
 class Order {
 -int tableNumber
 -Stack~MenuItem~ items
 -LocalDateTime timestamp
 +addItem(MenuItem)
 +undoLastItem()
 +getItems()
 +getTotal()
 }
 
 class TransactionNode {
 -Order order
 -TransactionNode next
 }
 
 class TransactionHistory {
 -TransactionNode head
 -TransactionNode tail
 +addTransaction(Order)
 +getAllTransactions()
 }
 
 class OrderQueue {
 -Queue~Order~ pendingOrders
 +enqueue(Order)
 +dequeue()
 +peek()
 +displayKitchenView()
 }
 
 class POSSystem {
 -Menu menu
 -OrderQueue kitchenQueue
 -TransactionHistory history
 -Order currentOrder
 +startNewOrder(int)
 +addToOrder(MenuItem)
 +undoLast()
 +submitOrder()
 +sortByPrepTime(List)
 }
 
 class Main {
 +main(String[])
 -displayMainMenu()
 -handleCashierMode()
 -handleKitchenMode()
 -handleManagerMode()
 }
 
 Menu --> MenuItem : contains
 Menu --> MenuCategoryBST : organizes by category
 MenuCategoryBST --> BSTNode : uses
 BSTNode --> MenuItem : stores
 Order --> MenuItem : contains stack of
 TransactionHistory --> TransactionNode : linked list of
 TransactionNode --> Order : contains
 OrderQueue --> Order : queues
 POSSystem --> Menu : uses
 POSSystem --> OrderQueue : manages
 POSSystem --> TransactionHistory : logs to
 POSSystem --> Order : builds
 Main --> POSSystem : controls","title":"POS System Architecture"}
